title: Show a View as a Widget
excerpt: I would like to show a particular view from a table in a widget, but it seems like I can only show a table. Would it be possible to create a view widget?

posts.author: elle322 (EM)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to show a particular view from a table in a widget, but it seems like I can only show a table. Would it be possible to create a view widget?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
You could filter the widget. It might help you in getting only the desired data to show up

posts.author: elle322 (EM)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much for the thought! Unfortunately, I don’t want to filter to only show some rows. Rather, I want to be able to only show some columns, which I don’t think filter allows (but if I am mistaken, please let me know!).

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@elle322,

After you have added the table, try going to the settings screen. To get there first click on the three dots menu of the widget. Then click the gear icon. From there you should be able to select the columns that you want to show.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: elle322 (EM)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh wow, that is exactly what I needed! Thanks so much for telling me how to do this, Jim.
